name: regent_charge_history_1781539954_act2_start_a10_longline
description: 12-turn Charge transform-target diagnostics for Regent A10 run 1781539954 at Act 2 start.
assumptions: Layer 17 models the Act 2 start deck.
Charge deck dEV is base EV minus the without_charge variant EV.
The 2026-07-16 exploratory report used --runs 200; this fixture keeps 2000 for a formal rerun.
Transform diagnostics are collected with the CLI --trace-transforms flag.
